{{CargoOrgan
|name=Divine Dragon Biceps
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10857
|idx=62
|description=When Divine Dragon committed to self-discipline, the cosmos trembled. A being capable of granting wishes, now chasing raw muscular power—its physique reaching peaks other lifeforms can only dream of.
|skill=
|hp=1220
|def=159
|atk=191
|rush=158
|gene1=Per Divine Dragon Descent, {race} ATK +6
Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|gene2=Per 5 Shrine Flying Objects shot, {race} HP +60
Shrine flying objects shot: 100/100
|gene3=Ignore Fire RES +60
|gene4=Per Divine Dragon descended, all ELMT DMG +4
Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|gene7=Per Divine Dragon descended, all ELMT DMG +12 (Awakened)
|}}
